calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Tax Costs; Meorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of John F. Rutan Jr
Off Calendar Apr-17-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Guy N. Webster, Esq. of the Law Offices of John A. Hauser, T: 714.371.2759 ext.2738, for plaintiff/moving party, by Court Call;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF SCOTTSDALE INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion To Tax Costs is DENIED. The memorandum of costs filed by defendants was timely filed since it is undisputed that notice of entry of judgment or dismissal was never served. Defendants did not act in any way that would constitute a waiver of their right to seek costs. Defendants are prevailing parties for purposes of the costs statutes since all claims against them were dismissed. All costs sought to be taxed were reasonably incurred and reasonably necessary and are allowed per the court's discretion.

ORDER SIGNED.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Not reported.
